name: notion
description: Notion skills and the Notion MCP server packaged as a Codex plugin.

interface.shortDescription: Use Notion skills and MCP in Codex
interface.longDescription: Use Notion skills and the hosted Notion MCP server to search, read, create, and update workspace content for knowledge capture, meeting notes, research documentation, and spec-to-implementation workflows.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Notion to find the relevant workspace docs for this task, summarize the current context, and update the right page with the outcome.
